novice-robes.name: Novice Robes
novice-robes.description: Simple robes lined with thread meant to hold cantrips.

mystic-robe.name: Mystic Robe
mystic-robe.description: Layered blue cloth stitched with warding script.

archmage-raiment.name: Archmage Raiment
archmage-raiment.description: A regal mantle embroidered with constellations and circles of power.

enchanted-plate.name: Enchanted Plate
enchanted-plate.description: Armor animated by sorcery, now stilled.

voidweave-robes.name: Voidweave Robes
voidweave-robes.description: Black silk woven through with threads that drink moonlight.

trail-leathers.name: Trail Leathers
trail-leathers.description: Supple leathers dyed to disappear beneath leaves and dusk.

scout-mantle.name: Scout Mantle
scout-mantle.description: A weatherproof cloak and leather harness favored by border wardens.

warden-cloak.name: Warden Cloak
warden-cloak.description: A layered cloak of treated hide and feather-light shadowcloth.

vanguard-mail.name: Vanguard Mail
vanguard-mail.description: Linked mail reinforced at the shoulders for relentless front-line pushes.

lioncrest-plate.name: Lioncrest Plate
lioncrest-plate.description: Golden-etched plate once worn by the sworn defenders of a fallen keep.

dusk-leathers.name: Dusk Leathers
dusk-leathers.description: Supple dark leathers that move without a whisper.

nightcloak.name: Nightcloak
nightcloak.description: A charcoal cloak that melts into alleys, reeds, and midnight hedgerows.

gloomweave.name: Gloomweave Jerkin
gloomweave.description: A sleek jerkin woven with greythread that confuses the eye at a glance.

acolyte-vestments.name: Acolyte Vestments
acolyte-vestments.description: Plain but reverent vestments sewn with protective scripture.

templar-vestments.name: Templar Vestments
templar-vestments.description: Layered clerical armor for those who bring mercy with a shield-arm.

cathedral-robes.name: Cathedral Robes
cathedral-robes.description: High ceremonial robes layered with hidden wards and ash-proof lining.

soulbound-vestments.name: Soulbound Vestments
soulbound-vestments.description: Robes woven from the prayers of a hundred clerics, bound to the soul of whoever dons them.

hexweave-mantle.name: Hexweave Mantle
hexweave-mantle.description: A cloak of living spellwork stripped from the Fen Witch. It whispers cantrips in dead languages.

godplate.name: Godplate
godplate.description: Armor forged by a dead god. Heavier than sin, harder than faith.

leyweave-vestments.name: Leyweave Vestments
leyweave-vestments.description: Robes woven from pure ley-energy. They shimmer between realities.

abyssal-leathers.name: Abyssal Leathers
abyssal-leathers.description: Leather cut from something that should not have had skin.

miracle-vestments.name: Miracle Vestments
miracle-vestments.description: Vestments that glow when prayer is answered. They glow often.

horizon-cloak.name: Horizon Cloak
horizon-cloak.description: A cloak that blends with any terrain. The horizon is always behind you.

permafrost-mail.name: Permafrost Mail
permafrost-mail.description: Chainmail forged from permafrost ore. Cold to the touch but warm in battle.

frozen-weave-robes.name: Frozen Weave Robes
frozen-weave-robes.description: Robes woven with spectral ice threads. They shimmer with inner light.

frostreach-leathers.name: Frostreach Leathers
frostreach-leathers.description: Cured in the freezing winds. Light, warm, and nearly silent.

drakebone-plate.name: Drakebone Plate
drakebone-plate.description: Armor plated with ice drake scales. Nearly impervious to cold and steel.

volcanic-mail.name: Volcanic Mail
volcanic-mail.description: Chainmail forged in volcanic heat. Resists fire and blade.

demonhide-robes.name: Demonhide Robes
demonhide-robes.description: Robes stitched from demon leather. They writhe subtly.

ashveil-leathers.name: Ashveil Leathers
ashveil-leathers.description: Armor cured in sulfur and ash. Light and fire-resistant.

caldera-plate.name: Caldera Plate
caldera-plate.description: Plate armor forged in the caldera's heart. Nearly indestructible.

voidplate-armor.name: Voidplate Armor
voidplate-armor.description: Plate armor infused with void energy. Partially exists in another dimension.

reality-weave-robes.name: Reality Weave Robes
reality-weave-robes.description: Robes woven from threads of stabilized reality. They resist void corruption.

shadow-veil-leathers.name: Shadow Veil Leathers
shadow-veil-leathers.description: Leather armor that shifts between realities. Hard to hit what isn't fully there.

sovereign-plate.name: Sovereign Plate
sovereign-plate.description: Armor forged from sovereign ichor and omega plates. The ultimate protection.
